prompt: Reference images 1 and 2. [Person's Pose and Expression] The person is staring straight into the camera with a haughty and alluring gaze. Lightly and calmly wrapping both hands around a huge crimson rose bouquet held as if holding a baby, creating a calm yet mysterious and faint atmosphere. [Person's Outfit] Wearing a black sleeveless dress with a luxurious and matte texture. The lower skirt part has voluminous and soft pleats, making the color of the gorgeous red roses visually stand out more. [Person's Hairstyle and Makeup Details] A brown-toned long wavy hairstyle with natural volume. Thick wavy bangs naturally flow along the face line, slightly covering one eye. The makeup highlights the lips by applying a vivid red lip matte on clean, white skin expression. [Lighting and Light Direction] Powerful natural light seeping from the left of the person softly wraps around the hair's gloss and shoulder line, shining powerfully enough to make the skin look whiter. [Texture and Color Mood] The deep black of the outfit, the intense red of the roses, and the velvet-like smooth texture of the rose petals contrast vividly with the clean skin texture, creating a seductive and classic fashion pictorial mood. [Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle] A vertical view at eye-level from the front for a fashion magazine cover. A shallow depth of field shoot that focuses on the upper body of the person and the rose bouquet and softly out-focuses the background to make the subject stand out dramatically. A 9:16 ratio cowboy shot. [Background Elements (Optional)] An exotic architectural background with classic European-style outdoor stone stairs and flower pots containing green plants. A huge 'BLANC' typography with a yellow and orange gradient is placed at the top of the screen. [Sign] The Threads logo operated by Meta is located small in the bottom right, and "CHAse" is written small above it like a signature in white cursive.
